cards.name: "Chieftain" heavy tank
cards.imagePrompt: A slightly cartoonish, stylized 3D illustration of a British Chieftain Mk 5 main battle tank. Clean sandy-brown or green camo studio colors, exaggerated chunky tracks and main cannon barrel. Polished claymation or vinyl toy look, centered subject, clean studio lighting, simple colored gradient background. No text overlays.
